Title

Credits

This ﬁeld requires a written proposal listing at least three courses 9 totaling at least 9 credits. 1

Total Credits

9

1 The proposal must be submitted to the Undergraduate Committee of the AREC department. Committee approval must be obtained 30 or more credit hours before graduation. A student designed ﬁeld may be used to study a foreign language as part of the AREC curriculum.
